prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic vertical image of a young Japanese-inspired cybernetic woman seated at an outdoor café table in a traditional garden pavilion, wearing an ornate red, white, and gold floral kimono with layered sleeves and a decorative hair arrangement of flowers, tassels, and kanzashi pins. She has long black hair and visible robotic prosthetic hands and forearms with white-and-black segmented mechanical fingers resting near the table. Place an oversized takeaway coffee cup in the extreme foreground, centered and dominating the composition, with a red plastic lid, cream paper body, delicate gold circuit-board line art, red sakura blossoms, and the café name Sakura Circuits Cafe printed near the bottom. The cup logo should show a circular red emblem with a stylized kimono figure and sakura motifs, partially obscured by a soft square blur; also place a larger soft square blur over the woman’s face, hiding her facial features. Set the scene on a polished dark wooden table decorated with fine gold circuit traces, in a warm Japanese veranda with wooden beams, exactly three visible glowing paper lanterns in the background, cushioned wooden chairs, and a serene garden pond with rocks, trimmed shrubs, trees, and a small stone lantern. Use shallow depth of field, golden-hour backlight, warm ambient tones, realistic reflections on the table, detailed fabric embroidery, and high-end commercial photography style. Keep the composition intimate and centered, with the cup sharpest and the background softly blurred; no extra text besides the café name.
